entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: Validation_Plan_Compilation Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE ProvisioningProject PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <ProvisioningProject identity="Amanda Ross"> <ExpansionItems> <ExpansionItem application="IIQ" cause="Role" name="Capabilities" operation="Retain" sourceInfo="IT2ADEngineering" value="SyslogAdministrator"/> </ExpansionItems> <MasterPlan> <ProvisioningPlan> <AccountRequest application="ActiveDirectory" nativeIdentity="CN=Amanda Ross,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com" op="Modify"> <AttributeRequest name="memberOf" op="Add" value="CN=DataArchive,OU=Groups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"/> </AccountRequest> </ProvisioningPlan> </MasterPlan> <ProvisioningPlan targetIntegration="ActiveDirectory" trackingId="f7c1fc246c2b46aa96f8808a97484c62"> <AccountRequest application="ActiveDirectory" nativeIdentity="CN=Amanda Ross,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com" op="Modify"> <AttributeRequest name="memberOf" op="Add" value="CN=DataArchive,OU=Groups,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"/> </AccountRequest> </ProvisioningPlan> <ProvisioningPlan targetIntegration="IIQ" trackingId="1a747ca65c364ec6b29d007db0aaa668"> <AccountRequest application="IIQ"> <AttributeRequest name="Capabilities" op="Retain"> <Value> <List> <String>SyslogAdministrator</String> </List> </Value> </AttributeRequest> </AccountRequest> </ProvisioningPlan> <ProvisioningTarget assignmentId="87260ad56ff64360b8b8d19da75c49b3" retain="true" role="IT2ADEngineering"> <AccountSelection applicationId="ActiveDirectory" applicationName="ActiveDirectory" selection="CN=Amanda Ross,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"> <AccountInfo displayName="Amanda Ross" nativeIdentity="CN=Amanda Ross,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"/> </AccountSelection> </ProvisioningTarget> </ProvisioningProject>
